title: PlanReviewVerdict
description: Output of the rebar.llm plan-review gate (`rebar review-plan <id>`): a PASS/BLOCK/INDETERMINATE verdict from a deterministic Layer-1 floor (P1-P9) + a four-pass (find -> verify -> decide -> coach) review of a ticket's whole plan, the inverse of the completion-verification close gate. SHAPE-ONLY: posture/decision rules are enforced by the orchestrator (code), not the schema. `verdict` is `string` (not a strict enum) so casing can be normalized. Findings are permissive objects (each carries an `id`, `criteria`, `decision`, `severity`, `priority`, etc.); the BLOCKING set is exempt from the advisory cap. The MCP `review_plan` tool returns this shape as a plain dict but advertises no outputSchema (live LLM call - a documented NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT), exactly like verify_completion.

verdict.description: PASS | BLOCK | INDETERMINATE (normalized by the orchestrator; not a strict enum).

blocking.description: Findings that BLOCK the claim (DET floor by default; an LLM criterion only when opted in). EXEMPT from the advisory cap - all are always returned.

advisory.description: Surfaced advisory (coaching) findings, capped at the config top-N by priority. Overflow goes to the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar, not here.

coaching.description: Pass-4 affirmative coach notes over the surviving advisory findings: {move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs[], coaching}. Prose is rendered deterministically from a locked move template.

indeterminate.description: Findings the verifier could not resolve (e.g. budget/tool-unavailable).

overflow.description: Advisory findings beyond the cap (sidecar-only; not surfaced to the agent).

dropped.description: Findings dropped by Pass-3 (low validity / cited-reference veto; sidecar-only).

coverage.description: What ran: the DET-floor per-check coverage, the criteria routing, chunk count, llm_ran, and the verdict counts - recorded on the attestation so the review's completeness is visible.

resolution_class.description: Systemic-degrade disposition (story blackbear): the closed resolution-class the LLM-failure classifier assigned. Present only on a degraded/INDETERMINATE verdict; absent on a normal verdict.

retryable.description: Whether resolution_class is transient/retryable (drives CLI exit 11); mirrors LLMOutcome.retryable.

diagnostic.description: Sanitized, redacted failure diagnostic (no secrets/PII); present with resolution_class.

material_fingerprint.description: Hash of the plan's material content (description/AC/file_impact/decomposition), bound into the signed attestation for material-edit invalidation.

signature.description: Attestation status: {signed: bool, key_id?, head_sha?} on a signed PASS, or {signed: false, reason|error}.

sidecar_emitted.description: Whether the REVIEW_RESULT observability sidecar event was written (best-effort).
